message:
Add contribution radar/spider chart to leaderboard profile pages (#1357)

Adds an SVG radar chart ("Expertise Areas") to each contributor's
profile page showing their contribution distribution across 6 console
domains: Operations, Dashboard, Agents, Missions, Testing, and Security.

Scores are computed client-side by keyword-matching topic cluster names
from the existing profile data against each dimension's keyword set.
The chart uses a dark-theme-compatible design with cyan/teal fill,
amber axis labels, concentric grid rings, and percentage annotations.

No new dependencies — built with pure SVG and React.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
